overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a scenic mountain ridge trail. The character traverses a dirt path surrounded by tall grass and pine trees with panoramic views of a distant lake and mountain range. The clip features a brief pause to observe the landscape before continuing along the rocky ridge.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain ridge trail with developing valley views

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the narrow dirt trail on the mountain ridge with swords strapped to his back

entered.detail: narrow winding dirt path cutting through the grassy ridge
dense cluster of tall evergreen trees on the left slope
layered blue mountain peaks fading into the hazy horizon
golden-brown tall grass covering the sloping terrain

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt walking along a narrow dirt trail on a mountain ridge. Pine trees line the left side while golden grass covers the right slope. The camera follows from behind as the path gradually reveals distant mountain ranges on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: scenic mountain viewpoint overlooking lake valley

events.description: character stops walking and pauses on the ridge to observe the surroundings
character rotates to face the panoramic view of the lake and valley behind him

agents.ego_description: Geralt stops on the ridge to survey the landscape, rotating to take in the panoramic view of the lake and distant mountains

entered.detail: expansive body of water visible in the valley below with distant structures on the far shore
large decaying log lying beside the trail

segments.scene_description: Geralt pauses his journey to appreciate the scenery. The camera rotates to reveal a stunning panoramic view of a large lake nestled in the valley below, with mountain ranges visible in the distance. A fallen log lies near the trail edge as the character stands still, surveying the landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain ridge trail with continuous lake views

events.description: character resumes walking along the ridge path

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues his journey along the mountain trail, navigating past rock formations and fallen logs while the lake remains visible to the right

entered.detail: massive gray boulders and rocky formations lining the left side of the trail
faint silhouette of a tower or structure visible across the lake on the far shore

segments.scene_description: Resuming his walk, Geralt proceeds along the ridge trail now flanked by large rock outcrops on the left. The panoramic lake view remains visible to the right as the path winds forward through the grassy terrain, with distant structures barely visible across the water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a mountain ridge trail that transitions from a narrow wooded path into a wide, panoramic vista. It begins by following Geralt from behind as he walks a dirt trail lined with pine trees and golden grass, with distant mountain ranges slowly emerging on the horizon. As he pauses his journey, the camera rotates away from the path to reveal a stunning panoramic view of a large lake nestled in the valley below, framed by a fallen log at the trail's edge. The scene then shifts back to the forward motion as Geralt resumes his walk, with the landscape opening up to include large rock outcrops on the left. Finally, the camera continues along the winding grassy terrain, keeping the expansive lake and faint distant structures in view to the right.
